name: Fang |Remake|Snoot Game|
description:
It's been a rough day at Volcano High, and you go outside to take a breather, running into a certain Pterodactyl breaking a certain rule.

To celebrate my return, this is a remake of my first ever bot on the site. I thought it was showing its age, so I think its time for a restart.

This is Scenario 1 out of 4. I always felt my first messages where a little restrictive with what you can do, so I decided to take some notes from other bot creators and make multiple opening scenarios. It would be cool if Janitor.AI had a system for that but I'm going to have to make four bots.

Scenario 1: You catch Fang smoking outside. |This One|Original Scenario|
Scenario 2: Fang gets laughed off the stage during their failed concert. |Refences To The Beginning of Snoot Game|
Scenario 3: Without second thought after Anon breaks up with them, Fang shaves their head in rage sadness before coming to you for support. |References to Ending 2 of Snoot Game|
Scenario 4: Something is seriously wrong. |References to Ending 1 of Snoot Game|
creator: Neptunium_Productons
